description: Architecture fitness checks that validate the repo architecture scaffold is internally wired and enforceable.

implementedChecks.description: Validates that every doc in docs/ has a canonical source registered in contracts
Validates that task phases have metadata.json, plan.md, test-plan.md artifacts
Validates module.json files in backend/ and frontend/
Validates metadata/ catalog completeness and generated INDEX.md files
Validates dependency graph is acyclic, metadata references are valid, and all implemented checks are wired
Ensures every Express route is documented in docs/<module>/API.md and docs/API.md endpoint registry; enforced through lint:repo-architecture via lint:api-docs
Validates ADR lifecycle: ADR docs exist, required sections present, status valid, metadata/adrs.json complete
CI gate that enforces all architecture fitness checks before deploy

deferredChecks.description: Route manifest validation — deferred until route manifests are fully implemented

exclusions.reason: api-doc-drift description references lint:api-docs to clarify enforcement chain
